title: Wolverley & Stourport with Austin (bike ride)

main_route.excerpt: At 11.30 we set off with Austin to Wolverley to camp for the night & go on a bike ride.
We set off at 9.15 on the bike ride & got back at 2.45.
main_route.note: Return to home inferred; diary entry ends mid-sentence but return home is standard for this trip pattern

excursions.label: Bike ride to Kidderminster and Stourport

stops.excerpt: We cycled to Kidder & had coffee.
Then on to Stourport. V.attractive Tontine Hotel & appartments for sale. Georgian, from start of canal hotels. Built by Brindley

boundary_flags: mixed_end: diary page B_0244 contains content from a following trip
summary: A one-night camping trip to Wolverley, Worcestershire, with Austin, followed by a Sunday bike ride cycling via Kidderminster to Stourport-on-Severn and back. The diary notes the Tontine Hotel at Stourport, a Georgian building associated with Brindley and the start of the canal era.
extraction_notes: The heading reads 'Saturday Oct 3[rd] 4th' suggesting the diarist initially wrote '3rd' then corrected to '4th'; Oct 4 2014 was indeed a Saturday so date_start is set to 2014-10-04. The Sunday heading reads 'Oct 5th' which is consistent. The diary entry ends mid-sentence ('it was a hamlet calls') so the page boundary is cut off; return to Birmingham is inferred. Austin's relationship is not stated but appears to be a grandchild or young family friend (he played with a girl called Ruby who was also there with her grandparents). Thomas is noted as being in India; Naomi about to have a baby — contextual family notes, not route stops. The mixed_end flag is set as the bundle metadata indicates mixed_end: true.
